title: 千羽
content_json: [{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"key":"0.36377713262160137","type":"illustrated-book","data":[{"key":"0.621db263ecdb","type":"tab-info","data":{"title":"","tabList":[{"key":"0.ecc481237e84","isShowTopDesc":false,"isShowBottomDesc":false,"title":"立绘-1","icon":"","content":["//cdnimg-v2.gamekee.com/wiki2.0/images/w_1920/h_1080/50364/842288/2025/11/24/25675.jpg"],"type":"image"},{"key":"0.ab8be2dcb30cd","isShowTopDesc":false,"isShowBottomDesc":false,"title":"立绘-2","icon":"","content":["//cdnimg-v2.gamekee.com/wiki2.0/images/w_307/h_467/50364/842288/2025/11/24/645934.jpg"],"type":"image"}]}},{"key":"0.789fde19d2ffa","type":"character-profile","data":{"isShowImageList":true,"isShowName":true,"isShowAttrList":true,"isShowDesc":true,"title":"基本资料","name":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"千羽"}]}]},"descTitle":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"异格者协会评定"}]}]},"desc":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"异格者千羽，Re-A芯片状态正常，未见异常波动。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"海德拉银行的职员，代理行长利维娅的行政秘书。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"千羽出身于艾尔特利斯E-02区域的高干家庭，由身为人类的养父母抚养长大。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"其家族颇有背景，现任经济署署长欧里特利、海德拉银行前经理人里奥莱斯，皆为千羽在家族中的长辈。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"其家族亦是海德拉银行第一经理人柯卡尔迪背后的强力助力，因其家族与柯卡尔迪的关系，千羽以优异的成绩完成了学业后，便被安排进入了海德拉银行的卡佩拉分行工作，并在柯卡尔迪的带领下，帮助柯卡尔迪完成银行业务。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"在海德拉银行中，她的人缘很好，在同事们眼中，她温和有礼，认真负责，从不会与他人起冲突，是一位众人都乐于与之交往的少女。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"在公事上，她也总是会把事情做得尽善尽美，柯卡尔迪和维罗妮卡都曾称她为「完美的秘书」。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"法恩利行长意外身亡后，海德拉银行因此陷入混乱，千只羽得到了诸位经理人抛出的橄榄枝，但在千羽看来，!有柯卡尔迪和利维娅，能够继承法恩利行长的遗志，因此，她也不留余力地支持着利维娅，支持着柯卡尔迪。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"为此，柯卡尔迪带着千羽一起扶持了利维娅接任代理行长。在柯卡尔迪的安排下，成为了利维娅的行政秘书与机要秘书，帮助利维娅处理事务。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"现在的千羽，正以其丰富的资历、与和善周全的处事风格，为利维娅捍卫着海德拉银行基座上，那块象征着和平的基石。"}]}]},"attrList":[{"key":"0.bfc12efaafc","title":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"稀有度"}]}]},"content":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"SSR"}]}]}},{"key":"0.502fb7b7fb545","title":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"原质属性"}]}]},"content":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"理"},{"type":"image","src":"//cdnimg-v2.gamekee.com/wiki2.0/images/w_56/h_56/50364/842288/2025/10/12/754552.png","href":"","alt":"","style":{"width":"auto","verticalAlign":"middle","height":"22px"},"children":[{"text":""}]},{"text":""}]}]}},{"key":"0.9099e02f2af1c","title":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"所属势力"}]}]},"content":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"海德拉银行"}]}]}},{"key":"0.41ce1002b410d","title":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"称号"}]}]},"content":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"和光白翼"}]}]}},{"key":"0.14f327b6b15db","title":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"性别"}]}]},"content":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"女"}]}]}},{"key":"0.6eb19b12c8557","title":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"职业"}]}]},"content":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"行政秘书"}]}]}},{"key":"0.580b0d8414465","title":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text"
